capabilities_used.evidence: 2024-04-30: “man 52k for $BTC really has so much confluence.... 200d EMA .382 fib of the entire move Demand area/support”. 图3、图6都直接画出整段上升后的 Fib 回撤位，并把 0.382/0.5 一带当作需求区。

2024-04-30: “Me longing the $BTC dip today at $59k”；2024-05-31: “$SOL: Prob get ready to bid $150s again and be patient”；2026-04-04: “$NEAR... EMAs on the 4h all consolidating and it's at a great level.” 典型是趋势未坏时等回踩再接。
2024-04-30 明确提到 “200d EMA”；2025-07-31: “200 ema on the 4h hasnt been tested in a month”；2025-09-30: “200ema 4h holds and all is well”；2026-03-31: “4h 200 EMA is around $70k”。均线是他判断趋势/支撑的核心工具。
2025-08-31: “lower highs every time”；2025-08-31: “Eventually this will stop being lower highs and quick little spikes up followed by another move down”；图4也是标准下降通道+一连串更低高点的看空框架。
图4把此前支撑位 $107k / $80k / $60k 标成后续被跌破后的阻力与拒绝位，属于很典型的支撑变阻力/破坏块回测逻辑。2026-04-11: “BTC bulls trying to flip resistance to support... nothing conclusive yet” 也直接体现 flip/lose/retest 思维。
2026-02-27: “probably a good idea to just trade at the range low or break of the range high”；2025-11-30: “Trading conditions get hard when there is a clear lack of a trend”；图1右侧与图7都是明确箱体/平台结构。
他频繁把市场定义为 chop：2025-07-31 “we're still in extremely choppy waters”；2025-11-30 “clear lack of a trend”；2026-01-31 “expecting a bit more chop”。先判定是否震荡，再决定轻仓/等位。

2026-04-10: “I'm still probably not going to knife catch though when there are better options”；2026-01-31: “I want to see a wick somewhere before I feel confident”；2024-01-31 对 JUP 也说更偏好 “buy this on the way up”。虽偶尔抄底，但知道要等确认。
2026-01-31: “I want to see a wick somewhere”；2025-03-31: “strong selling/wicks in both direction”；图4直接把 $126k / $97k / $73k 标成 rejection，核心是关键位插针后被拒。

虽然他经常口嗨无止损，但实盘语言里反复强调执行与位置：2025-08-31 “scaling in from this region down to 4000 makes $$ as long as you dont fuck up the execution”；2026-02-28 “For active trades, still would be cautious”。他不是标准风险教科书，但 active trade 上明显在控错。

2025-05-31: “low volatility conditions = probably lower size rn. wick in either direction can prob kill you”；2025-03-31: “These trading conditions are extremely difficult”；2026-02-28 战争新闻时他说 active trades 要谨慎。会根据波动环境缩仓。
2025-04-30: “Zoom out for $BTC. This chart still looks great imo”；2025-06-30: “Stay bullish $BTC”；2025-07-31: “The market is still pretty bullish for $BTC and $ETH”。他默认先问大趋势是否还没坏。
2024-02-29: “Every chain usually has some sort of meme leader”；2024-03-31 专门梳理 meme coin leaders；2024-12-31 “you'll want to buy the next AI dip”；2024-12-31 “hodl the AI coins”；他大量做板块轮动和龙头筛选。
2024-04-30: “this is just a deviation!!! SEND IT!!”；图4写出 “$73k bull trap”；图2顶部结构画出冲高后的失败延续下跌。假突破/诱多是他常用解释框架。
图2在 1h 上明确画出三段拱形顶部，第三次推动后预期走弱下跌，和三驱/三次冲顶衰竭思路高度一致。
2025-04-30 对 FARTCOIN 的表达是顺着强趋势追随，但同时经常提“already pumped”后的继续与衰竭判断；图7、图8都在追踪强单边后是否继续扩张，图2则是短线加速后的衰竭。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Stair-Step Box Consolidation
new_capabilities_proposed.description: After an impulse move, price forms a horizontal box, breaks higher, then builds a new higher box above prior support. Repeated base-building is treated as trend health and continuation.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 价格快速上冲后进入横盘箱体，突破后在更高位置再搭建新的横盘平台。连续的“平台抬升”被视为趋势健康、适合顺势持有或等回踩接回。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 图7 的 FARTCOIN 画出两个连续抬高的平台；图8 的 PENGU 也是水平箱体突破后扩张；他常说“bit more chop and next leg up soon”。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Post-Dump Base Duration Analogy
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Compare the current post-dump consolidation in bars/days/volume versus a prior base to estimate whether enough time has passed for a local bottom to form.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把当前暴跌后的横盘整理与历史底部在持续时间、K线数量、成交量上做类比，用来判断局部底部是否“盘够了”。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 图1 直接比较两段 BTC 底部区间：左侧“18 bars, 54d, Vol 1.74M” 对右侧“14 bars, 42d, Vol 819.65K”，明显是在做历史底部时长/量能 analog。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Lower-High Rollover Sequence
new_capabilities_proposed.description: A series of rallies failing at progressively lower highs, often drawn as repeated rounded tops or arches, signaling buyer exhaustion before a sharper breakdown.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 反弹一波比一波低，常表现为连续拱顶/圆弧高点，说明买盘衰竭，随后更容易出现加速下跌。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 图2 在 BTC 1h 上连画三段弧顶并给出下跌路径；2025-08-31 也反复说“lower highs every time”。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: HTF Confluence Demand Zone
new_capabilities_proposed.description: A buy zone defined by overlapping Fibonacci retracement, major moving average, and horizontal support/demand. The confluence matters more than any single tool.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 用斐波回撤、关键均线和水平支撑/需求区重叠来定义买点，共振强于单一指标。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-04-30: “52k for BTC really has so much confluence.... 200d EMA .382 fib... Demand area/support”；图3 对 RNDR 的绿色区域正是这种多重共振买法。

personal_quirks.quote: Coins are for trading, not for marrying
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 币主要是交易工具，不做长期情感绑定，轮动与兑现优先。

personal_quirks.quote: Being a good trader means changing your mind/bias/outlook.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 允许快速修正观点，市场结构变化时不死扛原判断。

personal_quirks.quote: Trade at the range low or break of the range high, buying here for active trades is a bit of a tough spot imo
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 不在区间中部乱开仓，只做边界或确认突破。

personal_quirks.quote: I'm still probably not going to knife catch though when there are better options
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 瀑布下跌里优先等确认，不做低胜率硬接刀。

personal_quirks.quote: low volatility conditions = probably lower size rn. wick in either direction can prob kill you
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 低波动和不确定环境下降低仓位，避免被双向插针扫掉。

unique_traits: 他和一般只会画趋势线的 TA 交易员不同，核心是“高周期结构 + Fib/EMA 共振区 + 板块/龙头轮动”三件套，尤其擅长在 BTC 稳住时去找最强 meme/AI/强势山寨。另一方面，他语言风格极其随性甚至戏谑，但图表框架并不杂乱，反而高度依赖箱体、支撑阻力翻转、底部盘整时长和 rejection。整体上是明显的顺势多头交易员，但在高波动和无趋势阶段会承认不确定、降低激进度。

low_conviction_phrases: don't personally have much conviction either way
